name: code_review
description: Review code for bugs, security issues, and improvements using LLM.
description_for_agent: Review code for bugs, security vulnerabilities, style issues, and suggest improvements. Parameters: code (string, optional — code to review), file_path (string, optional — path to file to review), language (string, optional — programming language, auto-detected), focus (string, optional — 'bugs', 'security', 'style', 'performance', 'all'; default 'all'). Returns categorized review findings with suggestions.

focus.description: Review focus: bugs, security, style, performance, all
